calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Illsley of Perry Johnson Anderson Miller & Moskowitz, LLP telephone number 707-525-8800 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Redwood Credit Union.
Jorge Lemos telephone number 415-292-2464 Defendant in Propria Persona.
Ellen Rosenthal Court Certified Interpreter #300572 (Spanish/English).

Mr. Lemos provided financial information. The Court ruled as follows: The claim of exemption of Jorge Lemos is granted. Funds being held by the Sheriff's Office in the amount of $660.96 are to be returned to Jorge Lemos/Judgment Debtor. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Roger J. Illsley, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, REDWOOD CREDIT UNION.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JORGE LEMOS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Pam Mullins sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $15,493.75
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2762.76
Attorney's Fees: $1875.00
Costs: $475.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $20,606.51
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Set For Trial On Dec-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
